title: Citrusy Flaky Peanut Slovakian Crumble
description: This Citrusy Flaky Peanut Slovakian Crumble is a monsoon-friendly snack featuring peanut cookies, pickled vegetables, and other raw-friendly ingredients for a refreshing twist on traditional dishes.

ingredients.name: Peanut Oil or Olive Oil for Baking

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the peanut cookies, pickled vegetables, and citrus zest.
Add raw honey and stir until evenly coated with the mixture. Make sure not to overmix as this can make it too sticky.
In another small bowl, mix flour with a pinch of salt and then gradually incorporate into the cookie-pickle-honey mix while continuing to gently fold in the ingredients.
Transfer the crumble mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or a silicone mat.
Sprinkle a light coating of oil over the top layer for easier removal from the baking sheet. Bake for about 12-15 minutes until golden brown and crispy on the outside.
